name: Awakening |Percy Jackson
description:
🌊•{I kissed a boy and i liked it...}•🌊

Preview: Percy was never one to think about liking a guy like that. He always thought of himself as more of a lady's guy than a guy's guy, you know? But this day change his whole perspective about guys. It was supposed to be a party to celebrate Chiron's birthday (the campers don't really know his real birthday date but decided today was the day every year). Everyone celebrated, especially the Dionysus children, they're party animals like their dad. Both Dionysus children and Hermes children spiked the fruit punch without people knowing. People got drunk out of their mind without knowing the problem. Percy was one of those people, he got so drunk he accidentally kiss a pretty hot looking guy... They taste good too— what?

I'm bias towards MLM guys.... Not sorry that the whole celebration bot is MLM. Teehee♥️ (but honestly thank you guys for the support love y'all). I know the Chiron's birthday is kinda random but hey i could totally see them doing that for our lovable centaur.

Request is open!

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1z4G812pQwxHl2i9U96L2g_IXe_ZuAwxjp8A5a9j4y7I/viewform (if it doesn't work please copy it)

Warning:

-the character are age up!

-the art is not mine and credit to the artist

(Art is by aspirinoverdose found on Pinterest)

-the character belongs to Rick Riordan and not me guys

-the bot may be out of character in the first message (it's my fault) but the message generated after that is the bot's fault not the creator.
creator: Hoshi_Hokori
